title: sutera corymbosa
intro: Sutera corymbosa, also known as the Butterfly Pea, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and edible shoots. The leaves and flowers of the Sutera corymbosa plant have been used in traditional medicine for their potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sutera corymbosa are attributed to its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Sutera corymbosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, allowing individuals to harness its potential health benefits in various forms.
